name: Thought Work Claims
description: A blackboard claim table (public.thought_work_claims) plus RPCs (claim_thoughts, release_thought, release_claims_for_worker) that let many parallel workers process the same pool of thoughts without two of them grabbing the same one. Claims are made exclusive by a (thought_id, work_type) primary key with INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING, and a per-claim TTL with inline stale-claim reaping recovers work stranded by crashed workers. Thought ids are UUID, matching public.thoughts.id.
